task: Advanced high-value task: Safety Plc Truth-Table Row Simulation Output Review. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for safety PLC truth-table row. Embedded packet: Records: R1 guard_closed=58 estop_ok=93 curtain_clear=3; R2 guard_closed=67 estop_ok=89 curtain_clear=6; R3 guard_closed=53 estop_ok=104 curtain_clear=2. Remediation options: O1 changes guard_closed by -12% cost=84500; O2 changes estop_ok by -18% cost=100500; O3 changes curtain_clear by -25% cost=59500; max_budget=126000. Rules and constraints: run permission requires all three true; mismatch is safety critical; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, and machine-readable exception labels. Deliver safety_PLC_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
